2.0 15/01/2021 All 
New product: 
- Release of two forecast cycles a 
day (at 00:00 and 12:00 UTC) 
- Change of product name and 
dataset name 
- Change in filenames: each file will 
contain 12 hours of data starting 
from the date indicated in the 
filename 
- Model grid update in consistency 
with the physical product 
R. Lecci, D. Denaxa  
2.1 10/09/2021 All 
Upstream Data Changes: 
- nesting with GLOBAL waves 
system 
- use of higher spatial (1/10o) and 
temporal resolution ECMWF winds 
R. Lecci, D. Denaxa C. Derval

renaming and general revision R. Lecci, D. Denaxa
